content.boundary: Applies to the statutory grade-entry structure of gimnáziums nationally; does not address vocational-track content, teacher pay, or higher-education admission.
content.change_lever: Amend Act CXC of 2011 to abolish 5th- and 7th-grade entry points to gimnázium tracks, converting all gimnáziums to 4-year (post-Grade-8) entry only, following the structural logic of Poland's 1999 reform.
content.name: Delay selection age to 14 (Polish-style single-structure reform)
content.system_problem: Hungary tracks students far earlier (ages 10-12) than the OECD average (age 15), and early tracking is causally linked to higher inequality without clear mean-performance benefits [F-live-finnish_reform-01, F-live-finnish_reform-04].
